ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the model */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Dataset used for training the model */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the model */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type FOREIGN KEY ("model_type") REFERENCES model_types ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "range_of_values" TEXT /* Range of values for the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or iteration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or iteration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model or iteration */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the model or iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the dataset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset (in MB) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iteration_hyperparameters" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id", "hyperparameter_id")
)
